version_message:
Automatically detect dependencies of mods you install (Modrinth + CurseForge). It will prompt you asking you if you would like to install the dependencies as well, when you install a mod that it detects has dependencies. You can decline it, it is not forced.

Added a profile strip/area in the launcher tab.

Fix some issues with icons of mods not loading in the mod manager.

Made mods that don't have an icon show as a red X on a black background.

Made it so a dialog window appears when you click Set Skin, giving you control over whether it is a Slim or Classic skin type.

Added a feature called 'Skin Share Party' which makes it much easier to share your skin with friends. Supports hosting and joining a (TCP based) server to share your skin.
